prompt: Transform the given image into a charming Decorative Folk Flat Illustration with playful doodle elements and a bold vibrant color palette completely different from the original image. Simplify all details into clean flat shapes with handmade imperfect outlines, soft paper textures, and a whimsical childlike storybook feel. Turn the characters into cute stylized figures with expressive eyes and rosy cheeks, and decorate the scene with stars, hearts, flowers, leaves, moons, swirls, and abstract doodles. Keep the artwork cozy, magical, colorful, and aesthetic, as if hand-drawn on textured white paper using gouache and marker pens.
